sourcesContent:
const Spacing = {
  xs: 4,
  sm: 8,
  md: 12,
  base: 16,
  lg: 20,
  xl: 24,
  xl2: 32,
  xl3: 40,
  xl4: 48,

  // Border radius
  radiusSm: 6,
  radiusMd: 8,
  radiusLg: 12,
  radiusXl: 16,
  radius2xl: 20,
  radiusFull: 9999,
};

export default Spacing;
